issue.title: Retry transient S3 upload failures
issue.body:
Planner could not generate a plan after 3 retries. Escalated to HITL.

The upload handler does not retry on transient 503 errors from S3. Each failure kills the job immediately instead of retrying with exponential backoff.

args.correction: Please implement retry logic with exponential backoff (max 3 attempts, 1s/2s/4s delays) in src/upload.py. The S3 client already supports retries via boto3 config — wire it up.
args.cause: CI test failures on upload_handler tests after merge.
